basic_details.job_title: MNNIT Allahabad Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) Recruitment 2026: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad has released the official notification for 1 Project Scientist posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

age_limit.age_details: As per Meity norms (The upper age limit is relaxable in the case of SC/ST/OBC/PwD and other reserved categories as per Gol rules).
age_limit.details: As per Meity norms. The upper age limit is relaxable in the case of SC/ST/OBC/PwD and other reserved categories as per Gol rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. or equivalent degree in GIS & Remote Sensing or equivalent discipline/Computer Science and Engineering /Electronics Engineering with minimum marks 60% or CPI 6.5 (In case of SC/ST/PwD marks not below 55% or CPI 6.0). OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering with a minimum of 70% marks or CPI 7.5 (In case of SC/ST/PwD marks not below 65% or CPI 7.0) with minimum 2 years of research, teaching and design and development experience OR M.Sc. or equivalent degree in GIS & Remote Sensing/Computer Science with minimum marks 70% or CPI 7.5 (In case of SC/ST/PwD marks not below 65% or CPI 7.0) with minimum two years research, teaching and design and development experience. AND selected through any one of the following: i) Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or GATE
qualification.details: M.Tech. or equivalent degree in GIS & Remote Sensing or equivalent discipline/Computer Science and Engineering /Electronics Engineering with minimum marks 60% or CPI 6.5 (In case of SC/ST/PwD marks not below 55% or CPI 6.0) Bachelor's degree in Engineering with a minimum of 70% marks or CPI 7.5 (In case of SC/ST/PwD marks not below 65% or CPI 7.0) with minimum 2 years of research, teaching and design and development experience M.Sc. or equivalent degree in GIS & Remote Sensing/Computer Science with minimum marks 70% or CPI 7.5 (In case of SC/ST/PwD marks not below 65% or CPI 7.0) with minimum two years research, teaching and design and development experience. AND selected through any one of the following: i) Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or GATE

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Scientist position at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Scientist position at MNNIT Allahabad is 17th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The required qualification is M.Tech. or equivalent in GIS & Remote Sensing, Computer Science, or Electronics Engineering, or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering with 2 years of experience, or an M.Sc. in GIS & Remote Sensing or Computer Science with 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 49,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email to the designated address, along with all required documents and a soft copy of the application form.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit is as per Meity norms, with relaxations available for SC/ST/OBC/PwD and other reserved categories as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Scientist position at MNNIT Allahabad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on merit and project needs, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is MNNIT Allahabad located?
faq.answer: MNNIT Allahabad is located in Allahabad (Prayagraj), Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211004.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 01/Project staff/2026.
